case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY

calendar.matters:
Defendant American Surety Company 'S Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John M. Rorabaugh, Esq., T:714.617.9600, for defendant/moving party;
Diana Rosenstein, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3933, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY'S Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment is GRANTED for reasons stated on the record. The Court also believes that Judge Quinn had the authority to continue the Nov. 6 hearing.
Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Summary Judment
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert White, Esq., T:714.617.9600, for defendant/moving party, by Court Call;
Diana Rosenstein, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3933, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court sent a rough copy of the transcript of the Nov. 6, 2017 hearing to plaintiff's counsel by email. The Court continues DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY 'S Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment to January 16, 2018 at 9:30 am for further hearing. Counsel waive notice. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
